zh.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece是Riece和Unknown的兒子，於1279年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾。他和Unknown至少有1個女兒。他去世於1309年在他的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece是Riece和Unknown的儿子，于1279年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾。他和Unknown至少有1个女儿。他去世于1309年在他的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Riece
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz, Erwin, Ewald, Gerhard.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech   Ryba   ‘fish’.
North German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + bod ‘messenger’, for example, Richbert.

variants.name: Ryba
meanings: Polish, Czech, Slovak, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name, nickname, or a Jewish artificial name from Polish, Czech, and Slovak ryba ‘fish’. As a metonymic occupational name it may have denoted a fisherman or a seller of fish (see also Ribar , Rybak , and Rybarczyk ). As a nickname it may have been bestowed on account of some fancied physical resemblance to a fish. The Sorbian surname is found mainly in Germanized forms, such as Riebe .

variants.name: Rieb
meanings: German: variant of   Riebe  . This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace).

variants.name: Rieben
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt.
Swiss German: variant of   Riebe   2.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named in Brandenburg and Pomerania.

variants.name: Riebeling
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Aloys, Elke, Hans.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Riebe  .

variants.name: Riebel
meanings: German:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Riebold, composed of the elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + bald ‘bold’.
occupational name for a turnip grower (see   Riebe   3).

nameMeanings.name: Aron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of   Aaron .

variants.name: Aaron
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the brother of Moses, who was appointed by God to be Moses' spokesman and became the first High Priest of the Israelites (Exodus 4:14–16, 7:1–2). It is of uncertain origin and meaning: most probably, like Moses , of Egyptian rather than Hebrew origin. The traditional derivation from Hebrew har-on ‘mountain of strength’ is no more than a folk etymology. The name has been in regular use from time immemorial as a Jewish name and was taken up by the Nonconformists as a Christian name in the 16th century. Since the late 1990s it has been widely popular.

en.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece was born in 1279, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Riece and Unknown. He had at least 1 daughter with Unknown. He died in 1309, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece est né en 1279, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Riece et Unknown. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Unknown. Il est décédé en 1309, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece wurde 1279 in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Riece und Unknown geboren. Er hatte mit Unknown mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1309 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece è nato il nel 1279 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Riece e Unknown. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Unknown. Morì nel 1309, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Aron Ap Riece родился в 1279 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Riece и Unknown. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Unknown. Он умер в 1309 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.
